---
title: "Mostly Monte Carlo Seminar Series"
---

A monthly seminar (mostly) on the theory and practice of Monte Carlo in statistics and data science.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Held on the **2nd Friday of each month** (approximately) at the **PariSanté Campus**.

Organised by Timothy Johnston and [Antoine Luciano](https://sites.google.com/view/aluciano), and formerly organised by Andrea Bertazzi and [Joshua Bon](https://bonstats.github.io).

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: callout-tip

## Next Seminar: 13th March

[Salle 03](psc_rooms.qmd), 3PM Friday

-  **Pierre Del Moral** *INRIA Bordeaux*
-  **Bob Carpenter** *Flatiron Institute*

[More details...](sem/2026/s2026_03.qmd)
:::

::: callout-warning

## Last Seminar: 20th February

[Salle 03](psc_rooms.qmd), 3PM Friday

-  **Paul Mangold** *SIMPAS*
-  **Alain Durmus** *CMAP*

[More details...](sem/2026/s2026_02.qmd)
:::


## Join the mailing list

<iframe src="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeYfJCkKc8sO4SR8qemic3ctTwcoRcmCrapRHIIT-BFA3-pEA/viewform?embedded=true" width="100%" height="676" style="max-width: 640px; border: 0;" frameborder="0" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0">

Loading...

</iframe>
